summary: Verified highway shield clustering fix and performance improvements. Shield count reduced from 27 to 14 for Council Bluffs→Denver route (545.9mi). All key features working: route calculation, highway shields with blob cache, exit signs, speed limit signs, zoom level indicator, blue navigation chevron, and data saver mode.

minor.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout for corridor POI search - external service issue, not app bug

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Shield clustering fix - SAME_ROAD_GAP (~8% of route) vs DIFF_ROAD_GAP (~0.5%) at NavigationView.tsx lines 3045-3048
VERIFIED: Shield blob cache (shieldBlobCacheRef) at line 960 - Map<string, string> for caching blob URLs
VERIFIED: Batch prefetch with Promise.all at line 991 before marker creation
VERIFIED: CSS performance optimizations in index.css - will-change: transform on .highway-shield-icon (line 53), .counter-rotate (line 65)
VERIFIED: contain: layout style on .highway-shield-icon (line 54), contain: layout on .counter-rotate (line 66)
VERIFIED: Data saver mode skips HERE API and uses SVG fallback (NavigationView.tsx lines 988, 1032-1036)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Shield clustering fix verified - reduced from 27 to 14 shields for 545mi route. The SAME_ROAD_GAP (~8% of route points) spaces shields on the same road ~40-60mi apart, while DIFF_ROAD_GAP (~0.5%) allows closer placement when route number changes. Shield blob cache pre-fetches unique shield images in parallel and stores as blob:// URLs. CSS uses will-change: transform and contain: layout for GPU compositing.

shield_clustering_fix.details: Shield count reduced from 27 to 14 for Council Bluffs→Denver route (545.9mi). Console log: '[Shields] Placed 14 highway shield markers on route'

shield_blob_cache.details: Shield images loaded correctly via blob cache. No duplicate HTTP requests observed.

exit_signs.details: 4 exit signs placed on route. Console log: '[Signs] Placed 4 exit signs on route'

speed_limit_signs.details: 4 speed limit signs placed on route. Console log: '[Signs] Placed 4 speed limit signs on route'

zoom_level_indicator.details: Zoom level indicator found with data-testid='zoom-level-indicator', shows value '17' initially, updates correctly when clicking zoom in/out buttons

blue_navigation_chevron.details: Blue navigation chevron user icon found with #nav-chevron-fill gradient

data_saver_mode.details: Data Saver option found in Settings under 'SYSTEM & DATA' section. When enabled, uses SVG fallback shields instead of HERE API images.

route_calculation.details: Route to Denver calculated: 545.9 mi, 7h 49m. Console shows route processing with 3950 coordinates

no_js_errors.details: No JavaScript errors during route calculation and shield placement. Only expected errors: GeolocationPositionError (no GPS in headless), 504 from external Overpass API

performance_optimizations_verified.css_contain: contain: layout style on .highway-shield-icon, contain: layout on .counter-rotate
performance_optimizations_verified.blob_cache: Shield images pre-fetched in parallel via Promise.all, stored as blob:// URLs to prevent duplicate HTTP requests
performance_optimizations_verified.shield_spacing: SAME_ROAD_GAP (~8% of route, ~40-60mi) for same road, DIFF_ROAD_GAP (~0.5%) when route number changes

console_logs_captured.shields: [Shields] Placed 14 highway shield markers on route
console_logs_captured.speed_limit_signs: [Signs] Placed 4 speed limit signs on route
